heading: Regulations
label: 3999 Regulations
text: The Secretary of the Interior may issue regulations necessary to carry out this subchapter (other than sections 3991, 4000, and 4001 of this title).
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to section 569 of the former Appendix to this title prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.
